scripts.build: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false NX_CACHE_PROJECT_GRAPH=false NX_DISABLE_DB=true node ./node_modules/nx/bin/nx.js run-many -t build --all --output-style=stream
scripts.test: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false NX_CACHE_PROJECT_GRAPH=false NX_DISABLE_DB=true node ./node_modules/nx/bin/nx.js run-many -t test --all --output-style=stream
scripts.lint: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false NX_CACHE_PROJECT_GRAPH=false NX_DISABLE_DB=true node ./node_modules/nx/bin/nx.js run-many -t lint --all --output-style=stream
scripts.typecheck: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false NX_CACHE_PROJECT_GRAPH=false NX_DISABLE_DB=true node ./node_modules/nx/bin/nx.js run-many -t typecheck --all --output-style=stream
scripts.release:preflight: pnpm lint && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm typecheck && pnpm release:whoami && pnpm release:publish:dry
scripts.release:version: NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false NX_CACHE_PROJECT_GRAPH=false NX_DISABLE_DB=true node ./node_modules/lerna/dist/cli.js version --yes
scripts.release:publish: pnpm release:whoami && NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false NX_CACHE_PROJECT_GRAPH=false NX_DISABLE_DB=true node ./node_modules/lerna/dist/cli.js publish from-package --yes
